sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa lap toh Zomi te, Minam lian in nong bawl a
Topa lap touh Zomi te, Gual tawh tan bang kim ding in
pilna siam na te nong pia, Inn leh lo te nong pia a..
Topa lap toh Zomi te, Minam lian aw Zomi te

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong makaih a, hong hilh pa, Lei vui pan hong lam Topa
Tagah inn pan hong dom to, Kumpi inn dong ah hong kha

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Zomi te thupha hong pia in, Minam lian in hong bawl a.
Zomi te hong lam sang in, Gual tawh tan bang kim ding in.
Mi pil tampi nong pia a, Mi siam tampi zong nong pia
Topa lap toh Zomi te, Mipil mi siam zomi te

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Zomi te hong dom sang in, Minam lian in nong bawl a.
Zomi te thupha hong pia in, Gual tawh tan bang kim ding in.
Mihau tampi nong pia a, Milian tampi zong nong pia.
Topa lap toh Zomi te, Mihau, Milian Zomi te.
